# Theorem: Cross-Platform Narrative Laundering

## Statement
Let each platform layer \(k\) have state \(x^{(k)}_t\). If layers influence each other:

\[
x^{(k)}_{t+1}=A_kx^{(k)}_t+\sum_{\ell \ne k}B_{\ell \to k}x^{(\ell)}_t+m^{(k)}_t
\]

then manufactured signal on one layer can change downstream states on other layers when \(B_{\ell \to k}\ne 0\).

## Relevance
A TikTok trend can become a press story; a press story can become investor proof; investor proof can become customer trust.
